data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for cross-domain BI queries with consistent dimensions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of cross-domain BI queries with consistent dimensions. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is met. The linked use case discusses the need for consistent dimensions but lacks supporting evidence, leading to an inconclusive status regarding requirement satisfaction.
gaps: Cross-domain BI queries with consistent dimensions is not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
